cases.task_zh: 检查这个小程序项目是否能被本地 CLI 自动化。
acceptance_criteria: Uses vince-mp doctor only.
Passes --workspace-root explicitly when project path may be outside cwd.
Reports JSON checks and no runtime side effects.

cases.task_zh: 对当前已经打开的微信开发者工具做 live smoke，不要重启客户端。
acceptance_criteria: Uses smoke-existing or run attach mode.
Does not use launch, reLaunch, navigation, media install, or mocks.
Reads route/pageStack/pageData before snapshot.

cases.task_zh: 当前 Skyline 页面 snapshot 卡住了，继续收集证据。
acceptance_criteria: Treats SNAPSHOT_ELEMENT_ENUMERATION_TIMEOUT as a uid blocker.
Keeps pageStack/pageData as partial evidence.
Does not retry by launching or restarting DevTools.

cases.task_zh: 绕过 Skyline camera 预览，注入一张 fixture 图片模拟拍照。
acceptance_criteria: Loads skyline-media reference.
Uses media camera-mock only with explicit fixtureImage or mockConfig.
Runs restore after mock workflow or reports restore command.

cases.task_zh: 调试 Skyline canvas 是否真的画出了内容。
acceptance_criteria: Starts media instrumentation explicitly.
Uses list/canvas-export/canvas-sample evidence.
Reports unsupported partial evidence when runtime APIs are absent.

cases.task_zh: 只截取当前小程序页面里的某一个 UI 元素，用来反复修补视觉问题。
acceptance_criteria: Queries or snapshots first to obtain a fresh uid.
Uses run elementScreenshot with explicit output under --workspace-root.
Reports Skyline query or geometry timeout as a blocker instead of guessing coordinates.
Rejects output outside --workspace-root.
Reports PATH_OUTSIDE_WORKSPACE.
Does not suggest disabling path checks.

cases.task_zh: 帮我重构小程序页面源码，不需要打开开发者工具。
acceptance_criteria: Does not use this skill unless runtime execution is requested.
